docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GERMONE, NOELLE AS TO DEFENDANT DIBRANO, DIMITRI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-24-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-24-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,900.00 FILED BY GERMONE, NOELLE AS TO DEFENDANT DIBRANO, DIMITRI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-24-2014 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (2 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF GERMONE, NOELLE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF -SIGNED SERVED JAN-23-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DIBRANO, DIMITRI
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-24-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GERMONE, NOELLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIBRANO, DIMITRI $3,900.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,965.00, STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $2600.00 HAVE BEEN ADDED TO THE JUDGMENT DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5 (C). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
